docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $133.72 SERVED JAN-27-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 02/06/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UMCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF BEN PATRIACCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA LISS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,361.41 FILED BY PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ABIDE BY THE PROCESS SET FORTH IN THE WRITTEN AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. A CLAIM FOUNDED IN UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS BEYOND THE STATUTORY LIMITATIONS PERIOD. THE COURT FINDS NO EMERGENCY EXTINGENCY EXISTED AT THE TIME THE REPAIRS WERE UNDERTAKEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
